name_en: ❤️Classic Check Double Strap Bag, vintage yet playful, very popular💞. It stays ahead of trends for 10 years. Vintage and classic, full of Burberry's British style💖. Exquisitely crafted in an Italian workshop. Features Burberry Check, contrast stitching leather trim, cotton blend lining. Drawstring opening, leather top handle, front zip pocket. Imported calfskin💖. Dimensions 24✕13✕37cm
